items.title: Microbiome and metabolites impact enteric and central nervous systems in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) has been linked to gastrointestinal symptoms and alterations in the gut microbiota. The enteric nervous system (ENS) coordinates intestinal function and sits at the host-microbe interface. The mechanisms by which luminal changes relay to the central nervous system (CNS), where motor neurons reside, have yet to be completely defined. In this narrative review, we first present evidence from ALS patient cohorts and preclinical models alongside mechanistic studies of infection, dysbiosis, and related neurodegenerative diseases to discuss how the microbiota and its metabolites may affect the ENS and CNS in ALS. Next, we propose a plausible mechanism of ALS pathogenesis through the gut-microbiome-brain axis. We further offer a summary of clinical trials that have studied the impacts of the microbiota on human ALS. Finally, we discuss future directions for studies of microbiota-ENS-CNS interactions in ALS. Better understanding of the dynamic interactions among the microbiota, microbial metabolites, neuroactive metabolites, and inflammation through the ENS/CNS in ALS will provide innovative insights into ALS prevention and treatment.
items.titleZh: 微生物组和代谢物影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了ALS患者和动物模型中肠道微生物群及其代谢物如何通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响肠道神经系统和中枢神经系统，并提出了可能的发病机制。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS中微生物组与神经系统的相互作用，提出了通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响ALS发病的机制假说，为ALS研究者提供了新的治疗靶点和预防策略方向。

aiRead.keyFinding: 微生物群及其代谢物通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统，提出了基于该轴的ALS发病机制假说。
aiRead.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，结论基于现有文献，缺乏原始实验数据验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对ALS患者微生物组调节的临床试验结果，以及微生物代谢物（如短链脂肪酸）对神经炎症和运动神经元保护作用的机制研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）与胃肠道症状和肠道微生物群改变有关。肠道神经系统（ENS）协调肠道功能，并位于宿主-微生物界面。管腔变化如何传递到运动神经元所在的中枢神经系统（CNS）的机制尚未完全明确。在这篇叙述性综述中，我们首先呈现来自ALS患者队列和临床前模型的证据，以及感染、菌群失调和相关神经退行性疾病的机制研究，以讨论微生物群及其代谢物如何影响ALS中的ENS和CNS。接着，我们通过肠-微生物组-脑轴提出了一种ALS发病机制的合理机制。我们进一步总结了研究微生物群对人类ALS影响的临床试验。最后，我们讨论了ALS中微生物群-ENS-CNS相互作用研究的未来方向。更好地理解ALS中微生物群、微生物代谢物、神经活性代谢物和炎症通过ENS/CNS的动态相互作用，将为ALS的预防和治疗提供创新见解。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，整合了最新的ALS患者队列和临床前模型证据，提出了肠-微生物组-脑轴在ALS发病中的新机制，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Therapeutic frontiers in ALS: iPSC-based drug discovery, cell therapy, and gene therapy-Advances through 2026.
items.summary: Three converging therapeutic paradigms-iPSC-based drug discovery, cell transplantation, and gene therapy-have substantially expanded the therapeutic pipeline for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) between 2020 and 2026. The FDA's accelerated approval of tofersen (Qalsody) in April 2023 marked the first treatment targeting a genetic cause of ALS. iPSC-derived drug candidates, including ropinirole and bosutinib, have completed early-phase clinical trials led by Japanese institutions. Cell therapies targeting neuroinflammation through regulatory T cells are being actively explored as immunomodulatory strategies, although efficacy remains to be established in adequately powered trials. Next-generation gene-silencing approaches-including RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics and AAV-delivered microRNA-entered first-in-human trials in 2024-2025. The identification of STMN2 as a downstream target of TDP-43 dysfunction has opened a potential TDP-43-downstream nucleic acid therapeutic avenue for sporadic ALS, which constitutes approximately 90% of all cases, with company-reported interim data suggesting target engagement in the ongoing Phase 1/2 ANQUR trial (QRL-201). This review synthesizes the latest evidence across all three therapeutic domains, with attention to the hierarchy of evidence, regulatory milestones, and the pioneering contributions of Japanese research groups.
items.titleZh: ALS治疗前沿：基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞治疗与基因治疗——截至2026年的进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了2020-2026年间ALS治疗的三大前沿方向：iPSC药物发现、细胞治疗和基因治疗。重点包括FDA批准的tofersen、日本主导的iPSC药物临床试验、靶向神经炎症的T细胞疗法，以及针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法（QRL-201）进入临床试验。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS治疗三大前沿领域的最新进展，特别强调了日本研究团队的贡献和TDP-43下游靶点STMN2作为散发性ALS治疗新靶点的转化潜力，为ALS研究者提供了全面的管线更新和未来方向参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: 三种治疗范式（iPSC药物发现、细胞治疗、基因治疗）在2020-2026年间显著扩展了ALS治疗管线，其中TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法为散发性ALS提供了新方向。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始数据；细胞疗法和部分基因疗法的疗效尚未在充分有力的试验中证实。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ANQUR试验（QRL-201）的完整数据公布，以及日本iPSC药物（罗匹尼罗、博舒替尼）的后续临床试验结果。

items.abstractZh: 三种汇聚的治疗范式——基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞移植和基因治疗——在2020年至2026年间显著扩展了肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的治疗管线。2023年4月，FDA加速批准tofersen（Qalsody），标志着首个针对ALS遗传病因的治疗方法。由日本机构主导的iPSC衍生候选药物（包括罗匹尼罗和博舒替尼）已完成早期临床试验。通过调节性T细胞靶向神经炎症的细胞疗法正在作为免疫调节策略被积极探索，但其疗效尚需在充分有力的试验中确立。下一代基因沉默方法——包括RNA干扰（RNAi）疗法和AAV递送的microRNA——于2024-2025年进入首次人体试验。STMN2被确定为TDP-43功能失调的下游靶点，为约占所有病例90%的散发性ALS开辟了一条潜在的TDP-43下游核酸治疗途径，公司报告的期中数据显示正在进行的1/2期ANQUR试验（QRL-201）中实现了靶点结合。本综述综合了这三个治疗领域的最新证据，关注证据等级、监管里程碑以及日本研究团队的先驱性贡献。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述涵盖了截至2026年的最新治疗进展，包括2024-2025年进入首次人体试验的下一代基因沉默疗法和针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法，具有高度ALS相关性和新近性。

items.title: Deletion of exon 2 in ALS-linked Sptlc1 causes lethality in homozygous mice but not in heterozygotes.
items.summary: Mutations in the human SPTLC1 gene have recently been linked to early-onset amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), characterized by global atrophy, motor impairments, and symptoms such as tongue fasciculations. All known ALS-linked SPTLC1 mutations cluster within exon 2, and a specific variant, c.58G>T, results in exon 2 skipping. However, it is unclear how the exon 2 deletion affects SPTLC1 function in vivo and contributes to ALS pathogenesis. Leveraging the high genomic sequence similarity between mouse and human SPTLC1 , we created a novel knock-in mouse model with a CRISPR/Cas9-mediated deletion of exon 2 in the endogenous murine Sptlc1 locus. Although heterozygous mice did not develop motor defects or ALS-like neuropathology, homozygous mutants died prematurely. These findings provide valuable insights into SPTLC1 exon 2 biology and serve as a useful resource for future mechanistic studies.
items.titleZh: ALS相关Sptlc1基因外显子2缺失导致纯合子小鼠致死，但杂合子小鼠存活
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过CRISPR/Cas9技术构建了Sptlc1外显子2缺失的小鼠模型，发现纯合子小鼠致死，而杂合子小鼠未出现运动或神经病理异常，提示外显子2对生存至关重要，但单拷贝缺失不足以引发ALS表型。
items.insight: 该研究首次在体内验证了ALS相关SPTLC1外显子2缺失的致病性，明确了纯合缺失的致死性，为理解SPTLC1突变导致早发性ALS的机制提供了关键动物模型，值得ALS研究者关注其后续的机制探索。

aiRead.keyFinding: Sptlc1外显子2纯合缺失导致小鼠致死，而杂合缺失不引起运动缺陷或ALS样病理。
aiRead.limitation: 杂合子小鼠未表现出ALS表型，可能无法完全模拟人类疾病；仅关注了外显子2缺失，未涵盖其他突变类型。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应探索外显子2缺失如何影响SPTLC1蛋白功能及鞘脂代谢，并开发条件性敲除模型以研究成年期作用。

items.abstractZh: 人类SPTLC1基因的突变最近被关联到早发性肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS），其特征为全身性萎缩、运动障碍以及舌肌束颤等症状。所有已知的ALS相关SPTLC1突变均聚集在外显子2内，其中特定变异c.58G>T导致外显子2跳跃。然而，外显子2缺失如何影响SPTLC1在体内的功能并促进ALS发病机制尚不清楚。利用小鼠和人类SPTLC1之间高度相似的基因组序列，我们通过CRISPR/Cas9介导的内源性小鼠Sptlc1位点外显子2缺失，创建了一种新型敲入小鼠模型。尽管杂合子小鼠未出现运动缺陷或ALS样神经病理学改变，但纯合子突变体过早死亡。这些发现为SPTLC1外显子2的生物学功能提供了有价值的见解，并为未来的机制研究提供了有用资源。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究利用最新CRISPR技术构建了ALS相关Sptlc1外显子2缺失的小鼠模型，直接关联ALS发病机制，具有高度转化价值。

items.title: Preparing Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Clinics to Provide Longitudinal Care for Individuals Carrying ALS Risk Variants.
items.summary: Emerging genetic therapies and the expansion of genetic testing are identifying individuals carrying amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) risk variants who would benefit from surveillance and early intervention. Anticipating the geographic distribution and clinical needs of this population is essential for optimizing care delivery and ensuring readiness as new therapies become available. We estimate the number of individuals in the United States carrying ALS risk variants and project the clinical engagement required to support this population. This is especially timely because ALS clinics are already grappling with rising numbers of patients with symptomatic ALS and deep funding cuts. We developed a population model to estimate the number of symptomatic individuals with gene-positive ALS and asymptomatic gene carriers across US states over the next decade (year 1: 2026). State-level ALS prevalence and incidence were calculated using 2 approaches: (1) race-adjusted ALS rates from the Atlanta metropolitan study applied to 2023 Census demographics and (2) observed state-level ALS case counts from the National ALS Registry (2011-2018). Gene-positive cases were estimated using published frequencies of SOD1 , C9orf72 , FUS , and TARDBP pathogenic variants. At-risk relatives were modeled assuming autosomal-dominant inheritance with ∼5 first-degree and ∼7 second-degree living relatives per proband, and broad uptake of cascade genetic testing. Surveillance needs were modeled as 1 annual visit per asymptomatic carrier, which was normalized by the number of ALS centers per state. In year 1 (2026), the model estimated 2,704 symptomatic gene-positive ALS carriers. With an average of 4.25 carrier relatives per proband, 10,944 asymptomatic carriers were projected nationwide. Most states required <50 additional visits per clinic annually, with 12 states in the 50-99 range and none exceeding 100. By year 10 (2035), the model projected 7,474 symptomatic and 26,111 asymptomatic carriers. State-level demand shifted substantially: only 6 states remained below 50 visits per clinic annually; 22 reached 50-99; 18 reached 100-199; and 3 exceeded 200. Gene-targeted testing is projected to substantially increase ALS clinic visits among asymptomatic gene carriers. While current infrastructure may accommodate the initial rise, within a decade, most states will require significant expansion. Anticipating and planning for this growth now is essential to ensure seamless integration of gene-positive individuals into ALS care.
items.titleZh: 准备肌萎缩侧索硬化症诊所，为携带ALS风险变异个体提供纵向护理
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过人口模型预测，随着基因检测普及，美国ALS诊所将面临无症状基因携带者就诊量激增。2026年预计有约1.1万无症状携带者，到2035年将增至约2.6万，多数州需在十年内扩大诊所容量。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统量化了基因检测对ALS诊所工作量的长期影响，为卫生系统提前规划资源分配提供了关键数据，对ALS预防性护理的落地具有直接指导意义。

aiRead.studyType: 观察性临床研究（人口模型预测）
aiRead.keyFinding: 到2035年，美国无症状ALS基因携带者数量将增至约2.6万，多数州ALS诊所年就诊量需增加100次以上。
aiRead.limitation: 模型依赖假设（如级联检测普及率、遗传模式），且未考虑基因治疗对携带者自然史的影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注真实世界级联检测实施数据，以及各州ALS诊所容量扩张计划的实际进展。

items.abstractZh: 新兴的基因治疗和基因检测的扩展正在识别携带肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）风险变异的个体，这些人将从监测和早期干预中受益。预测这一人群的地理分布和临床需求对于优化护理提供和确保在新疗法可用时做好准备至关重要。我们估算了美国携带ALS风险变异的人数，并预测了支持这一人群所需的临床参与。这尤其及时，因为ALS诊所已经在应对症状性ALS患者数量增加和资金大幅削减的问题。我们开发了一个人口模型，以估算未来十年（第1年：2026年）美国各州基因阳性症状性ALS患者和无症状基因携带者的数量。州级ALS患病率和发病率通过两种方法计算：（1）将亚特兰大都市研究的种族调整ALS率应用于2023年人口普查人口统计数据；（2）来自国家ALS登记处（2011-2018年）的观察到的州级ALS病例数。基因阳性病例使用SOD1、C9orf72、FUS和TARDBP致病性变异的已发表频率进行估算。风险亲属建模假设常染色体显性遗传，每个先证者约有5名一级和约7名二级在世亲属，并广泛采用级联基因检测。监测需求建模为每位无症状携带者每年一次就诊，并按各州ALS中心数量进行标准化。在第1年（2026年），模型估计有2,704名基因阳性症状性ALS携带者。每个先证者平均有4.25名携带者亲属，全国范围内预计有10,944名无症状携带者。大多数州每个诊所每年需要少于50次额外就诊，12个州在50-99次范围内，没有州超过100次。到第10年（2035年），模型预计有7,474名症状性携带者和26,111名无症状携带者。州级需求显著变化：只有6个州每个诊所每年就诊次数低于50次；22个州达到50-99次；18个州达到100-199次；3个州超过200次。基因靶向检测预计将显著增加无症状基因携带者的ALS诊所就诊次数。虽然当前基础设施可能适应初始增长，但在十年内，大多数州将需要显著扩展。现在预测和规划这一增长对于确保基因阳性个体无缝融入ALS护理至关重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新人口模型，直接关联ALS基因携带者的临床护理需求，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Patient-Reported Symptom Burden in Individuals With Parkinson Disease.
items.summary: To better understand Parkinson disease (PD) burden and advance the clinical management of patients, it is important to ascertain the most significant symptoms directly from individuals with PD. This research used patient-reported data to identify the most prevalent and impactful symptoms experienced by individuals with PD and determine the demographic and clinical characteristics that are associated with higher symptomatic burden. We conducted semistructured qualitative interviews of 20 individuals with self-reported PD, obtaining 2,978 quotes regarding potential symptoms of importance. Findings from these interviews informed the development of a cross-sectional survey study designed to asess the impact of these symptoms in a larger cohort. Four-hundred four participants with self-reported PD participated in the survey study, providing the prevalence and relative importance (0-4 scale) of 301 symptoms representing 14 symptomatic themes. We subsequently performed subgroup analysis to identify demographic and clinical characteristics that were associated with a higher prevalence of symptomatic burden in PD. The most prevalent symptomatic themes identified by participants were sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (87.0%) and fatigue (84.7%). The symptomatic themes with the greatest impact (0-4) on participants' lives were fatigue (1.34) and sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (1.29). A higher prevalence of disease burden across all symptomatic themes was most strongly associated with speech impairment, gait freezing, and a duration of tremor greater than 5 years. The impact of PD on the lives of those living with this disease is multisystemic, reaching beyond the cardinal motor symptoms. Fatigue, sleep disturbances, and daytime sleepiness are highly prevalent and important to this population.
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者报告的症状负担
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过患者报告数据发现，帕金森病患者最常见的症状是睡眠障碍和疲劳，这些非运动症状对生活质量的影响甚至超过运动症状。
items.insight: 尽管该研究聚焦于帕金森病，但其强调非运动症状（如疲劳和睡眠障碍）在神经退行性疾病中的核心地位，对ALS研究具有重要启示：ALS患者同样面临严重的非运动症状负担，值得在临床试验和临床管理中给予更多关注。

aiRead.studyType: 横断面调查研究结合定性访谈
aiRead.keyFinding: 帕金森病患者最常见的症状是睡眠障碍和疲劳，而非运动症状对生活的影响最大。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量相对较小（404人），且依赖患者自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ALS患者中类似的患者报告结局研究，以比较非运动症状负担的异同。

items.abstractZh: 为了更好地理解帕金森病（PD）的负担并推进患者的临床管理，直接从PD患者那里了解最重要的症状至关重要。本研究使用患者报告的数据来识别PD患者最常见和影响最大的症状，并确定与较高症状负担相关的人口学和临床特征。我们对20名自我报告患有PD的个体进行了半结构化定性访谈，获得了2978条关于潜在重要症状的引述。这些访谈结果指导了一项横断面调查研究的设计，旨在评估这些症状在更大队列中的影响。404名自我报告患有PD的参与者参与了调查研究，提供了301种症状（代表14个症状主题）的患病率和相对重要性（0-4分）。我们随后进行了亚组分析，以确定与PD症状负担较高患病率相关的人口学和临床特征。参与者报告的最常见症状主题是睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡（87.0%）以及疲劳（84.7%）。对参与者生活影响最大（0-4分）的症状主题是疲劳（1.34）和睡眠障碍及白天嗜睡（1.29）。所有症状主题中疾病负担的较高患病率与言语障碍、步态冻结和震颤持续时间超过5年最为相关。PD对患者生活的影响是多系统的，超出了核心运动症状。疲劳、睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡在该人群中非常普遍且重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究近期（2026年发表）通过患者报告数据系统揭示了帕金森病中非运动症状的负担，其方法学（定性+定量结合）和发现对ALS等神经退行性疾病的症状管理研究具有直接转化价值。

items.title: Innate immune crosstalk in ALS/FTD pathogenesis.
items.summary: Marked by protein aggregation, impaired proteostasis, organelle stress, and chronic neuroinflammation, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) form a clinically, genetically, and pathologically overlapping disease spectrum. Increasing evidence indicates that innate immune activation is not merely a secondary response to neuronal injury, but an active driver of disease progression. In this review, we elaborate on how ALS/FTD-associated genetic lesions and pathogenic protein aggregates, including TDP-43, SOD1, FUS, and C9orf72-derived dipeptide repeat proteins, engage three interconnected innate immune pathways: cGAS-STING, NLRP3 inflammasomes, and TREM2-DAP12 signaling. We further highlight emerging crosstalk among these pathways, in which cGAS-STING and NLRP3 reinforce inflammatory signaling, while NLRP3-driven TREM2 shedding may impair microglial clearance and perpetuate proteostatic failure. Understanding this immune network may help define disease subtypes, identify biomarkers, and guide combinatorial therapeutic strategies that suppress harmful inflammation while preserving protective microglial functions.
items.titleZh: ALS/FTD发病机制中的先天免疫串扰
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，在ALS和FTD中，先天免疫激活不仅是神经损伤的后果，更是推动疾病进展的关键因素。文章详细分析了cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12三条免疫通路如何被致病蛋白（如TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72）激活，并揭示了它们之间的相互作用，例如cGAS-STING和NLRP3相互增强炎症，而NLRP3导致TREM2脱落可能削弱小胶质细胞的清理功能。作者认为，理解这一免疫网络有助于疾病分型、发现生物标志物，并为开发既能抑制有害炎症又能保留小胶质细胞保护功能的联合疗法提供指导。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS/FTD中三条关键先天免疫通路（cGAS-STING、NLRP3、TREM2-DAP12）的串扰机制，为理解免疫系统如何从保护性角色转变为致病性驱动因素提供了新框架，对开发靶向免疫网络的联合治疗策略具有重要指导意义。

aiRead.keyFinding: ALS/FTD中先天免疫激活（cGAS-STING、NLRP3、TREM2-DAP12通路）不仅是继发反应，更是疾病进展的主动驱动因素，且通路间存在相互增强或功能损害的串扰。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，其结论基于现有文献，缺乏原始实验数据验证；免疫串扰的具体分子机制和因果关系仍需进一步研究。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对cGAS-STING、NLRP3或TREM2通路的特异性抑制剂在ALS/FTD动物模型中的验证结果，以及基于免疫网络分型的生物标志物研究。

items.abstractZh: 以蛋白质聚集、蛋白质稳态受损、细胞器应激和慢性神经炎症为特征，肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）构成了一个临床、遗传和病理上重叠的疾病谱系。越来越多的证据表明，先天免疫激活不仅仅是神经元损伤的继发性反应，而是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。在这篇综述中，我们详细阐述了ALS/FTD相关的遗传缺陷和致病性蛋白质聚集体（包括TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72衍生的二肽重复蛋白）如何参与三个相互关联的先天免疫通路：cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12信号传导。我们进一步强调了这些通路之间新兴的串扰，其中cGAS-STING和NLRP3增强炎症信号，而NLRP3驱动的TREM2脱落可能损害小胶质细胞清除功能并延续蛋白质稳态失败。理解这一免疫网络可能有助于定义疾病亚型、识别生物标志物，并指导组合治疗策略，以抑制有害炎症同时保留保护性小胶质细胞功能。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路（cGAS-STING、NLRP3、TREM2-DAP12）的串扰这一前沿方向，揭示了免疫激活作为疾病主动驱动因素的新视角，具有直接的ALS转化价值。

items.title: PBMC DEG/miRNA biomarkers of TDP-43 pathology in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) lacks reliable, disease-specific, and minimally invasive biomarkers, representing a major barrier to early diagnosis and patient stratification. The primary aim of this translational pilot study was to identify a disease-specific, TDP-43-related, gene-microRNA (miRNA) signature in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of ALS patients with potential diagnostic value. To this end, we first identified differentially expressed disease-specific genes (dsDEGs) using a TDP-43-based rat model of ALS, generated by stereotaxic infusion of full-length (FL) TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) into the motor cortex. Transcriptomic profiling of the motor cortex revealed candidate dsDEGs, which were subsequently validated by RT-qPCR in motor cortex, spinal cord, and PBMCs from the same animals. To assess translational relevance, expression levels of these dsDEGs were analyzed in PBMCs from early- to mid-stage ALS patients and matched healthy controls, while disease specificity was evaluated using Parkinson's disease (PD) samples. In parallel, conserved miRNAs predicted to target the identified dsDEGs were examined in both rat and human PBMCs. Five dsDEGs, Mctp1, Penk, Mt2A, Drd1, and Rasgrp2, were consistently dysregulated across central and peripheral tissues in the TDP-43 rat model. RT-qPCR analysis of human PBMCs confirmed significant and selective dysregulation of these genes in ALS, but not in PD, supporting disease specificity. Moreover, exposure of human neuroblastoma cells and healthy PBMCs to TDP-43 recapitulated the ALS-like expression changes. Computational and experimental analyses identified seven conserved miRNAs targeting these dsDEGs, of which four were significantly downregulated in ALS PBMCs, supporting a coordinated regulatory network. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analyses demonstrated strong discriminative performance for both the gene signature (AUC 0.87-1.00) and the associated miRNAs (AUC 0.95-1.00). Together, these findings define a novel PBMC-based gene-miRNA signature that mirrors central ALS pathology and shows high diagnostic accuracy and disease specificity, highlighting its potential as a minimally invasive biomarker for ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS中TDP-43病理的PBMC DEG/miRNA生物标志物
items.summaryZh: 本研究在ALS患者外周血单核细胞中发现一组由5个基因和4个miRNA组成的特征，能高准确度区分ALS与健康对照及帕金森病，且与中枢TDP-43病理相关。
items.insight: 该研究首次在PBMC中建立与中枢TDP-43病理直接关联的基因-miRNA组合标志物，为ALS的微创诊断和疾病分层提供了新工具，值得跟踪其临床验证进展。

aiRead.studyType: 观察性临床研究（病例对照）
aiRead.keyFinding: 在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出5个基因（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1、Rasgrp2）和4个miRNA组成的特征，能高准确度区分ALS与健康对照及帕金森病，且与中枢TDP-43病理相关。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小，且为横断面设计，未评估标志物随时间的变化或与疾病进展的关系。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该基因-miRNA特征在更大ALS队列中的验证，以及其与疾病进展和TDP-43病理严重程度的相关性研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）缺乏可靠、疾病特异且微创的生物标志物，这构成了早期诊断和患者分层的主要障碍。这项转化性初步研究的主要目的是在ALS患者的外周血单核细胞（PBMC）中识别具有潜在诊断价值的疾病特异性、TDP-43相关的基因-微小RNA（miRNA）特征。为此，我们首先使用基于TDP-43的大鼠ALS模型（通过将全长TAR DNA结合蛋白43（TDP-43）立体定向输注至运动皮层生成）鉴定了差异表达的疾病特异性基因（dsDEG）。运动皮层的转录组分析揭示了候选dsDEG，随后通过RT-qPCR在同一动物的运动皮层、脊髓和PBMC中进行了验证。为评估转化相关性，分析了早期至中期ALS患者和匹配健康对照PBMC中这些dsDEG的表达水平，并使用帕金森病（PD）样本评估了疾病特异性。同时，在人和大鼠PBMC中检测了预测靶向已鉴定dsDEG的保守miRNA。在TDP-43大鼠模型中，五个dsDEG（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1和Rasgrp2）在中枢和外周组织中均持续失调。人PBMC的RT-qPCR分析证实这些基因在ALS中显著且选择性地失调，而在PD中则不然，支持其疾病特异性。此外，将人神经母细胞瘤细胞和健康PBMC暴露于TDP-43重现了ALS样表达变化。计算和实验分析鉴定了七个靶向这些dsDEG的保守miRNA，其中四个在ALS PBMC中显著下调，支持一个协调的调控网络。受试者工作特征（ROC）分析显示基因特征（AUC 0.87-1.00）和相关miRNA（AUC 0.95-1.00）均具有强大的区分性能。总之，这些发现定义了一种新的基于PBMC的基因-miRNA特征，该特征反映了中枢ALS病理，并显示出高诊断准确性和疾病特异性，突显了其作为ALS微创生物标志物的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年发表的最新数据，在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出与中枢TDP-43病理相关的基因-miRNA特征，具有高诊断准确性，为微创生物标志物开发提供了直接转化价值。

items.title: Early-onset neuroinflammation drives neurodegeneration caused by lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency.
items.summary: Phosphatidylinositol 3,5-bisphosphate [PI(3,5)P 2 ] is a lysosomal signaling lipid whose deficiency, caused by mutations in the PIKfyve complex subunits FIG4 or VAC14, underlies a spectrum of fatal neurologic diseases including Charcot-Marie-Tooth type 4J (CMT4J) and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). To map the molecular consequences of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency in the brain, we performed quantitative proteomic and transcriptomic analyses of three mouse lines bearing distinct loss-of-function mutations in Fig4 or Vac14, examining the brain at the presymptomatic and end stages. Strikingly, profound neuroinflammation was already present at postnatal day 5 (before significant neurodegeneration), characterized by complement activation, interferon signaling, and parenchymal infiltration of peripheral myeloid cells and T-cells. Isolated mutant microglia exhibited a markedly pro-oxidative transcriptional state with elevated reactive oxygen species, a partly non-cell-autonomous phenotype, being present in microglia from mice with conditional Fig4 inactivation in just neurons and astrocytes. Comparison of early (P5) and late (P25) proteomics data revealed that PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency impairs developmental remodeling of the brain proteome: proteins typically upregulated during postnatal maturation failed to accumulate, implicating lysosomal function in neurodevelopment. We identify coordinated elevation of p53, Fas receptor, inflammatory caspases, Gasdermin D, RIPK1, and ZBP1, consistent with multifactorial inflammatory cell death with features of apoptosis, pyroptosis, and necroptosis. Many of the dysregulated proteins are encoded by genes mutated in lysosomal storage disorders, ALS, CMT, Alzheimer's and Parkinson diseases, extending the pathogenic relevance of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency. Together, these findings establish that early neuroinflammation is a defining - and likely initiating - feature of neurodegeneration caused by disruption of lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 .
items.titleZh: 早发性神经炎症驱动由溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂不足引起的神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过分析三种不同Fig4/Vac14突变小鼠模型，发现溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂不足在神经退行性变发生前（出生后第5天）即引发强烈的神经炎症，包括补体激活、干扰素信号增强及外周免疫细胞浸润。突变小胶质细胞呈现促氧化状态，且这种炎症部分由神经元和星形胶质细胞非自主驱动。PI(3,5)P₂不足还阻碍了大脑蛋白质组的发育重塑，并激活多种炎症性细胞死亡通路（凋亡、焦亡、坏死性凋亡）。许多失调蛋白与ALS、阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病的致病基因相关。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统揭示了PI(3,5)P₂不足导致神经退行性变的核心机制是早发性神经炎症，而非直接神经元死亡，为ALS等疾病提供了新的治疗靶点窗口（如早期抗炎干预），并建立了溶酶体功能障碍与多种神经退行性疾病之间的分子联系。

aiRead.keyFinding: PI(3,5)P₂不足在神经退行性变发生前即引发早发性神经炎症，并激活多种炎症性细胞死亡通路，许多失调蛋白与ALS等疾病相关。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于小鼠模型，人类中PI(3,5)P₂不足的神经炎症时序和机制需进一步验证；未直接测试抗炎干预的治疗效果。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注PI(3,5)P₂通路在ALS患者脑脊液或组织中的炎症标志物验证，以及靶向早期神经炎症（如补体或干扰素通路）的干预研究。

items.abstractZh: 磷脂酰肌醇3,5-二磷酸[PI(3,5)P₂]是一种溶酶体信号脂质，其缺乏由PIKfyve复合体亚基FIG4或VAC14突变引起，是包括Charcot-Marie-Tooth 4J型（CMT4J）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）在内的一系列致命性神经系统疾病的基础。为了绘制大脑中PI(3,5)P₂不足的分子后果，我们对携带Fig4或Vac14不同功能缺失突变的三系小鼠进行了定量蛋白质组学和转录组学分析，检查了症状前和终末期的大脑。引人注目的是，在出生后第5天（在显著神经退行性变之前）已经存在深刻的神经炎症，其特征是补体激活、干扰素信号传导以及外周髓系细胞和T细胞的实质浸润。分离的突变小胶质细胞表现出显著促氧化的转录状态，伴有升高的活性氧，这是一种部分非细胞自主的表型，存在于仅神经元和星形胶质细胞中条件性失活Fig4的小鼠的小胶质细胞中。早期（P5）和晚期（P25）蛋白质组学数据的比较显示，PI(3,5)P₂不足损害了大脑蛋白质组的发育重塑：通常在出生后成熟过程中上调的蛋白质未能积累，暗示溶酶体功能在神经发育中的作用。我们确定了p53、Fas受体、炎症性半胱天冬酶、Gasdermin D、RIPK1和ZBP1的协同升高，与具有凋亡、焦亡和坏死性凋亡特征的多因素炎症性细胞死亡一致。许多失调的蛋白质由在溶酶体贮积症、ALS、CMT、阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病中突变的基因编码，扩展了PI(3,5)P₂不足的致病相关性。总之，这些发现确立了早期神经炎症是由溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂破坏引起的神经退行性变的一个定义性——且可能是起始性——特征。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，通过多组学分析首次证明早发性神经炎症是溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂不足驱动神经退行性变的起始事件，直接关联ALS致病机制，具有重要的转化价值。

items.title: Drivers of Rising Prevalence in Major Motor Neurodegenerative Diseases: Temporal Trends in Sweden and France (2003-2022).
items.summary: The prevalence of Parkinson disease (PD), multiple sclerosis (MS), and motor neuron diseases (MNDs) is rising globally. However, it is unclear to what degree this is related to an increase in incidence or to improved survival after diagnosis. We performed 2 nationwide, population-based, retrospective cohort studies, including all individuals living in Sweden between 2001 and 2016 and living in France between 2009 and 2022, respectively. Pooled mixed-effects regression models, with country as a random effect, were used to determine temporal trends in prevalence, crude and age-standardized and sex-standardized incidence, and age and life expectancy at diagnosis. Annualized prevalence of PD, MS, and MNDs increased significantly between 2003 and 2022 in the pooled model (PD: prevalence ratio [PR] per year = 1.014, p < 0.001; MS: PR = 1.029, p < 0.001; MND: PR = 1.028, p < 0.001). While the crude incidence of both PD and MS remained nearly stable over time (PD: incidence rate ratio [IRR] per year = 0.998, p < 0.001; MS: IRR = 0.992, p < 0.001), the standardized incidence showed a more marked decrease for PD (IRR = 0.986, p < 0.001) while remaining almost unchanged for MS (IRR = 0.995, p < 0.001). For MNDs, both the crude and standardized incidence increased over time (crude IRR = 1.018, p < 0.001; standardized IRR = 1.008, p < 0.001). Life expectancy at diagnosis of PD increased between 2003 and 2013 (+0.95 months per calendar year, p < 0.001) and then decreased between 2013 and 2022 (-1.20 months, p = 0.002), while it increased significantly over the entire study period for MS (+2.35 months, p < 0.001) and MNDs (+0.34 months, p = 0.01). These findings indicate that the rising MS prevalence is largely survival-driven and the rising MND prevalence reflects a true increase in incidence, whereas PD prevalence grows modestly, largely independent of incidence. Depending on the mechanism that drives prevalence, whether increased incidence reflecting changing risk factor exposures, improved survival due to therapeutic advances, or demographic aging of the population, inferences about underlying causes differ substantially between PD, MS, and MNDs, with direct implications for health care planning and etiologic research.
items.titleZh: 主要运动神经退行性疾病患病率上升的驱动因素：瑞典和法国的时间趋势（2003-2022年）
items.summaryZh: 这项基于瑞典和法国全国人群的回顾性队列研究（2003-2022年）发现，运动神经元病（MND）患病率上升主要由发病率真实增加驱动，而多发性硬化（MS）患病率上升主要因生存期改善，帕金森病（PD）患病率增长温和且与发病率无关。MND的粗发病率和标准化发病率均随时间显著增加。
items.insight: 该研究首次在大型全国性队列中明确区分了运动神经元病（包括ALS）患病率上升的驱动因素，指出MND患病率上升反映的是发病率真实增加而非生存期改善，这对ALS病因学研究（如环境风险因素）和医疗资源规划具有直接指导意义。

aiRead.studyType: 基于人群的回顾性队列研究
aiRead.keyFinding: 运动神经元病（MND）患病率上升主要由发病率真实增加驱动，而非生存期改善；MND粗发病率和标准化发病率均显著上升。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于瑞典和法国数据，可能不直接推广至其他地区；未区分MND亚型（如ALS与原发性侧索硬化）；生存期改善的测量可能受诊断时间偏移影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否进一步分析ALS亚型发病率上升的具体风险因素（如环境暴露、遗传背景），以及不同国家/地区是否呈现类似趋势。

items.abstractZh: 帕金森病（PD）、多发性硬化（MS）和运动神经元病（MND）的患病率在全球范围内上升。然而，这在多大程度上与发病率增加或诊断后生存期改善有关尚不清楚。我们进行了两项全国性、基于人群的回顾性队列研究，分别纳入2001年至2016年间生活在瑞典的所有个体和2009年至2022年间生活在法国的所有个体。采用以国家为随机效应的混合效应回归模型，确定患病率、粗发病率和年龄及性别标准化发病率、诊断时年龄和预期寿命的时间趋势。在混合模型中，2003年至2022年间PD、MS和MND的年化患病率显著增加（PD：患病率比[PR]每年=1.014，p<0.001；MS：PR=1.029，p<0.001；MND：PR=1.028，p<0.001）。虽然PD和MS的粗发病率随时间保持基本稳定（PD：发病率比[IRR]每年=0.998，p<0.001；MS：IRR=0.992，p<0.001），但标准化发病率显示PD下降更明显（IRR=0.986，p<0.001），而MS几乎不变（IRR=0.995，p<0.001）。对于MND，粗发病率和标准化发病率均随时间增加（粗IRR=1.018，p<0.001；标准化IRR=1.008，p<0.001）。PD诊断时的预期寿命在2003年至2013年间增加（每年+0.95个月，p<0.001），然后在2013年至2022年间下降（-1.20个月，p=0.002），而MS（+2.35个月，p<0.001）和MND（+0.34个月，p=0.01）在整个研究期间显著增加。这些发现表明，MS患病率上升主要由生存期驱动，MND患病率上升反映了发病率的真实增加，而PD患病率增长温和，基本与发病率无关。根据驱动患病率的机制——是反映风险因素暴露变化的发病率增加、治疗进展带来的生存期改善，还是人口老龄化——PD、MS和MND的潜在原因推断存在显著差异，这对医疗保健规划和病因学研究具有直接影响。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新发表的全国性数据，直接揭示了ALS/MND发病率真实上升的趋势，为ALS病因学研究和公共卫生策略提供了关键流行病学证据。

items.source: Neurological sciences : official journal of the Italian Neurological Society and of the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology
items.title: Diverging trends in motor neuron disease burden in China: an ageing-driven increase despite declining age-standardised rates - a GBD 2021 analysis.
items.summary: Age-standardised rates of motor neuron disease (MND) have declined in many settings, yet the absolute burden continues to rise in ageing populations. Whether this divergence is driven by demographic change or epidemiological shifts remains unclear, particularly in China. Using data from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2021, we analysed trends in MND burden in China from 1990 to 2021. Decomposition analysis was applied to quantify the contributions of population ageing, population growth, and changes in age-specific rates. Age-specific incidence patterns were compared with global estimates, and key findings were validated against recent Chinese epidemiological studies. Despite declining age-standardised prevalence and DALY rates, the absolute number of cases and DALYs increased substantially. Population ageing accounted for 46.0% of the increase in DALYs, followed by population growth (35.0%) and changes in age-specific rates (19.0%). Age-specific incidence rates in China were consistently lower than global estimates. External validation demonstrated high consistency with national epidemiological studies. The increasing burden of MND in China is primarily driven by demographic ageing rather than increasing disease risk. Declining age-standardised rates may mask growing healthcare demands in rapidly ageing populations.
items.titleZh: 中国运动神经元病负担的分化趋势：年龄标准化率下降但老龄化驱动的增长——基于GBD 2021的分析
items.summaryZh: 基于GBD 2021数据，中国MND的年龄标准化患病率和DALY率在1990-2021年间下降，但绝对病例数和DALY显著上升。分解分析显示，人口老龄化贡献了DALY增加的46%，人口增长贡献35%，年龄别发病率变化仅贡献19%。中国年龄别发病率低于全球水平。
items.insight: 该研究明确区分了流行病学风险变化与人口结构变化对MND负担的影响，提示中国ALS研究者应关注老龄化带来的医疗资源需求增长，而非仅关注发病率变化。

aiRead.keyFinding: 中国MND负担增长主要由人口老龄化驱动，而非疾病风险增加；年龄标准化率下降可能掩盖实际医疗需求。
aiRead.limitation: 依赖GBD模型估计，可能受中国数据质量影响；未区分MND亚型（如ALS与进行性肌萎缩）。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注中国ALS患者真实世界登记数据，验证老龄化对医疗资源利用和预后的具体影响。

items.abstractZh: 在许多地区，运动神经元病（MND）的年龄标准化率有所下降，但在老龄化人口中绝对负担持续上升。这种分化是由人口结构变化还是流行病学转变驱动尚不清楚，尤其是在中国。利用全球疾病负担研究2021的数据，我们分析了1990年至2021年中国MND负担的趋势。采用分解分析量化人口老龄化、人口增长和年龄别发病率变化的贡献。将年龄别发病率模式与全球估计进行比较，并针对近期中国流行病学研究验证关键发现。尽管年龄标准化患病率和DALY率下降，但绝对病例数和DALY显著增加。人口老龄化占DALY增加的46.0%，其次是人口增长（35.0%）和年龄别发病率变化（19.0%）。中国的年龄别发病率始终低于全球估计。外部验证显示与国家流行病学研究高度一致。中国MND负担的增加主要由人口老龄化驱动，而非疾病风险增加。年龄标准化率的下降可能掩盖了快速老龄化人口中不断增长的医疗需求。
items.frontierRationale: 基于2021年最新GBD数据，首次量化中国MND负担中人口老龄化的主导作用，具有高ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: The role of ultrasound in addressing neurodegenerative diseases: A review of mechanisms, applications, and challenges.
items.summary: With the aging of the global population, neurodegenerative diseases have become a major public health challenge. Currently, there are many limitations in the traditional treatment of neurodegenerative diseases, such as medicine, deep brain stimulation, transcranial magnetic stimulation, and transcranial direct current stimulation, including the inability to penetrate the blood-brain barrier (BBB) accurately and challenges in achieving precise and quantitative control during the treatment process. Ultrasound is an emerging neural modulation technology that stands out for its non-invasive nature, precise targeting, and unique ability to penetrate the BBB, demonstrating tremendous application potential. In this review, we summarized the common types of neurodegenerative diseases, including Alzheimer's disease (AD), Parkinson's disease (PD), and Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), and the limitations of traditional treatments. It delves into the physical principles, classification, mechanisms, and unique advantages of ultrasound therapy in neuromodulation. It provides a detailed account of the current status of application of ultrasound in neurodegenerative diseases, and represents the advantages and challenges currently faced by ultrasound therapy, which offers insights into future research directions and technological improvements.
items.titleZh: 超声在解决神经退行性疾病中的作用：机制、应用与挑战综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述系统总结了超声技术在神经退行性疾病（包括ALS）中的应用，重点介绍了其非侵入性、精准靶向和穿透血脑屏障的优势，并分析了当前面临的挑战。
items.insight: 对于ALS研究者而言，超声技术提供了一种非侵入性、可重复的神经调控和药物递送手段，有望克服传统治疗中血脑屏障的障碍，为ALS的精准治疗开辟新路径。

aiRead.keyFinding: 超声技术凭借其非侵入性、精准靶向和穿透血脑屏障的能力，在神经退行性疾病（包括ALS）的治疗中展现出巨大潜力，但面临技术优化和临床转化的挑战。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始实验数据，结论依赖于已发表文献，可能存在发表偏倚。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注超声联合药物递送或基因治疗在ALS动物模型中的体内验证研究，以及早期临床试验的安全性数据。

items.abstractZh: 随着全球人口老龄化，神经退行性疾病已成为主要的公共卫生挑战。目前，神经退行性疾病的传统治疗方法（如药物、深部脑刺激、经颅磁刺激和经颅直流电刺激）存在诸多局限性，包括无法精确穿透血脑屏障，以及在治疗过程中难以实现精准和定量控制。超声是一种新兴的神经调控技术，以其非侵入性、精准靶向和独特的穿透血脑屏障能力而脱颖而出，展现出巨大的应用潜力。本综述总结了常见的神经退行性疾病类型，包括阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病和肌萎缩侧索硬化症，以及传统治疗的局限性。深入探讨了超声治疗在神经调控中的物理原理、分类、机制和独特优势。详细阐述了超声在神经退行性疾病中的应用现状，并介绍了超声治疗当前面临的优势和挑战，为未来的研究方向和技术改进提供了见解。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统整合了超声技术在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的最新应用进展，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Elevated urea levels in human frontotemporal dementia and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis post-mortem brain tissue: Evidence of a multi-dementia pathogenic mechanism.
items.summary: Frontotemporal dementia (FTD) and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) represent two neurodegenerative diseases on opposite sides of a movement disorder continuum. However, like many other neurodegenerative diseases, the molecular pathogenesis of FTD and ALS is not fully understood. Our group has previously reported evidence for a pervasive elevation of brain urea levels in five other dementia-causing diseases. However, brain urea levels have yet to be measured in ALS and FTD. Here, we employed ultra-high-performance liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry to characterise brain urea differences between control (n = 14/12) and ALS/FTD (FTD: n = 8/9; ALS: n = 13/14) cases in post-mortem tissue from two brain regions with different levels of neuropathological burden (high versus low). Elevated urea levels were observed in both the frontal cortex (high neuropathological burden) and primary visual cortex (low neuropathological burden) in cases with FTD. Contrastingly, in cases with ALS, elevated urea was observed in the primary motor cortex (high neuropathological burden), but not the dentate nucleus (low neuropathological burden). These results not only suggest that elevated urea levels are also present in ALS and FTD but imply that elevated brain urea is linked to a multi-dementia pathogenic mechanism. In contrast to ALS, the observation of elevated urea in regions of both high and low neuropathological burden in FTD implies that this phenotype is likely widespread and, therefore, may play a larger role in the pathogenesis of disease. Such a mechanism could offer new directions for developing treatments targeting this underlying pathology.
items.titleZh: 人类额颞叶痴呆和肌萎缩侧索硬化症死后脑组织中尿素水平升高：多痴呆致病机制的证据
items.summaryZh: 该研究首次在ALS和FTD患者死后脑组织中检测到尿素水平升高，且FTD中升高更广泛（涉及高、低病理负担区域），而ALS中仅见于高病理负担区域（初级运动皮层）。结果提示尿素升高可能是多种痴呆共有的致病机制，而非单一疾病特异性改变。
items.insight: 该研究将尿素代谢异常这一新兴机制扩展至ALS和FTD，为理解这两种疾病的共同病理基础提供了新线索，并可能开辟针对尿素循环的治疗靶点。

aiRead.studyType: 病例对照研究（死后脑组织分析）
aiRead.keyFinding: FTD和ALS患者死后脑组织中尿素水平升高，且FTD中升高更广泛，提示尿素代谢异常可能是多种神经退行性疾病的共同致病机制。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（FTD n=8/9，ALS n=13/14，对照组n=14/12），且为死后组织分析，无法直接推断因果关系或活体状态。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应关注尿素升高是否在活体脑脊液或血液中可检测，以及靶向尿素循环的药物（如尿素酶抑制剂）在ALS/FTD动物模型中的疗效。

items.abstractZh: 额颞叶痴呆（FTD）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）代表了运动障碍连续谱两端的两种神经退行性疾病。然而，与其他许多神经退行性疾病一样，FTD和ALS的分子发病机制尚未完全阐明。我们课题组此前报道了在另外五种痴呆致病疾病中脑尿素水平普遍升高的证据。然而，ALS和FTD中的脑尿素水平尚未被测量。本研究采用超高效液相色谱-串联质谱法，对来自两个具有不同神经病理负担水平（高与低）脑区的死后组织，比较了对照组（n=14/12）与ALS/FTD（FTD：n=8/9；ALS：n=13/14）病例之间的脑尿素差异。在FTD病例中，额叶皮层（高神经病理负担）和初级视觉皮层（低神经病理负担）均观察到尿素水平升高。相比之下，在ALS病例中，初级运动皮层（高神经病理负担）观察到尿素升高，但齿状核（低神经病理负担）未观察到。这些结果不仅表明ALS和FTD中也存在尿素水平升高，而且提示脑尿素升高与多痴呆致病机制相关。与ALS不同，FTD中高和低神经病理负担区域均观察到尿素升高，表明该表型可能广泛存在，因此在疾病发病机制中可能发挥更大作用。这种机制可能为开发针对这一潜在病理过程的治疗方法提供新方向。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，首次在ALS和FTD死后脑组织中系统检测尿素水平，揭示了尿素升高作为多痴呆共同致病机制的新近证据，具有重要的转化价值。

items.title: Nanoscale morphological and structural analysis of round and donut oligomers formed by C-terminal domain of TDP-43.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), frontotemporal dementia (FTD), Alzheimer's disease (AD), limbic predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy (LATE), and Parkinson's disease are associated with an abrupt aggregation of TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43). Although molecular mechanisms of this pathological aggregation remain unclear, accumulated evidence suggests that the C-terminus domain (C-terminal domain (CTD)) is the trigger of TDP-43 self-assembly into toxic oligomers and fibrils. While the secondary structure and morphology of protein fibrils have been well documented, very little is known about TDP-43 oligomers. This is primarily because of the transient nature and low concentrations of these protein species. In the current study, we utilize nano-infrared spectroscopy, also known as atomic force microscopy-infrared (AFM-IR) spectroscopy, to investigate the morphology and secondary structure of CTD of TDP-43 oligomers formed at the early and middle stages of protein aggregation. This innovative technique allows us to resolve both morphology and secondary structure of individual protein aggregates. We found that at the early stage of protein aggregation, CTD of TDP-43 formed two morphologically different protein aggregates: donut-like (DO) and round (RO) oligomers. DO yielded fibrillar species, while RO persisted throughout the entire course of CTD TDP-43 self-assembly.
items.titleZh: TDP-43 C末端结构域形成的圆形和甜甜圈样寡聚体的纳米尺度形态与结构分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究利用纳米红外光谱技术（AFM-IR）分析了TDP-43 C末端结构域在聚集早期和中期形成的寡聚体，发现两种形态不同的寡聚体：甜甜圈样（DO）和圆形（RO）。DO可进一步转化为原纤维，而RO则持续存在，提示不同寡聚体在TDP-43病理性聚集中的角色可能不同。
items.insight: 该研究首次在纳米尺度上区分了TDP-43 CTD寡聚体的两种形态，并揭示了它们在聚集过程中的不同命运，为理解TDP-43蛋白病（如ALS）中早期毒性寡聚体的形成机制提供了新的结构基础，可能指导针对寡聚体形态的干预策略开发。

aiRead.keyFinding: TDP-43 CTD在聚集早期形成两种形态不同的寡聚体：甜甜圈样（DO）和圆形（RO），其中DO可转化为原纤维，而RO持续存在。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于体外重组蛋白片段，未在细胞或动物模型中验证，且未明确两种寡聚体的具体毒性差异。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应关注DO和RO寡聚体在神经元中的形成与毒性，以及是否可作为ALS早期诊断或治疗靶点。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、额颞叶痴呆（FTD）、阿尔茨海默病（AD）、边缘系统为主的年龄相关性TDP-43脑病（LATE）和帕金森病均与TAR DNA结合蛋白43（TDP-43）的急剧聚集有关。尽管这种病理性聚集的分子机制尚不清楚，但累积证据表明，C末端结构域（CTD）是TDP-43自组装成毒性寡聚体和原纤维的触发因素。虽然蛋白质原纤维的二级结构和形态已有充分记录，但对TDP-43寡聚体的了解甚少，这主要是因为这些蛋白质种类的瞬时性和低浓度。在本研究中，我们利用纳米红外光谱（即原子力显微镜-红外光谱，AFM-IR）来研究蛋白质聚集早期和中期形成的TDP-43 CTD寡聚体的形态和二级结构。这种创新技术使我们能够解析单个蛋白质聚集体的形态和二级结构。我们发现，在蛋白质聚集的早期阶段，TDP-43的CTD形成了两种形态不同的蛋白质聚集体：甜甜圈样（DO）和圆形（RO）寡聚体。DO产生了原纤维样物种，而RO在整个CTD TDP-43自组装过程中持续存在。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，利用前沿的AFM-IR技术首次在单颗粒水平解析TDP-43寡聚体的形态与二级结构，直接关联ALS核心病理蛋白的早期聚集机制，具有高度转化价值。

items.title: Identification of spastic muscles involved in abnormal joint posture in patients with upper motor neuron syndrome: a narrative review.
items.summary: Few studies have specifically investigated which muscles are involved in abnormal joint posture (AJP) due to muscle spasticity and should therefore be targeted for botulinum toxin injections. This gap has significant implications for treatment efficiency, safety, health economics, and sustainable healthcare. A 2000 to 2025 (July) PubMed search identified 3,488 articles, but only 7 articles met the criteria for providing a method to determine the muscles involved in AJP due to muscle spasticity. Of these, just 2 have proposed how to measure each muscle contribution and only 1 focused on identifying the muscle actually responsible for the observed AJP. There are many strategies for determining the muscles involved in spasticity-related AJP, but they are primarily based on inference. They draw on clinical skills, which incorporate descriptive and functional anatomy, knowledge of different muscle and joint structures, simple rules of biomechanics, determination of the exact phase of the movement involved, consideration of compensatory AJP in these motor control deficient patterns, and, of course, the patient's goals. Achieving the authors' proposed objective would enable the standardization of clinical practices, confirm the effectiveness of treatments for spasticity, particularly botulinum toxin, and ensure that the correct dose is injected in the right muscle.
items.titleZh: 上运动神经元综合征患者异常关节姿势中痉挛肌肉的识别：一篇叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，目前缺乏系统方法来确定上运动神经元综合征中导致异常关节姿势的具体痉挛肌肉，现有方法多基于临床推断而非直接测量。
items.insight: 对于ALS研究者而言，该综述强调了痉挛肌肉精准识别的重要性，这直接关系到肉毒毒素注射等对症治疗的有效性和安全性，有助于优化ALS患者痉挛症状的管理。

aiRead.keyFinding: 仅有极少数研究提供了确定痉挛相关异常关节姿势中受累肌肉的具体方法，现有策略主要依赖临床推断。
aiRead.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，其结论受限于纳入文献的数量和质量，且未进行系统性偏倚评估。
aiRead.watchNext: 未来应关注开发基于客观测量（如肌电图、影像学）的标准化肌肉识别方法，并验证其在ALS患者中的有效性。

items.abstractZh: 很少有研究专门探讨哪些肌肉因痉挛导致异常关节姿势（AJP），因此应成为肉毒毒素注射的目标。这一空白对治疗效率、安全性、卫生经济学和可持续医疗具有重大意义。2000年至2025年（7月）的PubMed检索共发现3488篇文章，但只有7篇符合提供确定因肌肉痉挛导致AJP的肌肉方法的标准。其中，仅有2篇提出了如何测量每块肌肉的贡献，只有1篇专注于识别实际导致观察到的AJP的肌肉。确定痉挛相关AJP中受累肌肉的策略有很多，但主要基于推断。这些策略依赖于临床技能，包括描述性和功能性解剖学、不同肌肉和关节结构的知识、简单的生物力学规则、确定运动涉及的确切阶段、考虑这些运动控制缺陷模式中的代偿性AJP，以及患者的治疗目标。实现作者提出的目标将有助于临床实践的标准化，确认痉挛治疗（尤其是肉毒毒素）的有效性，并确保在正确的肌肉中注射正确的剂量。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统梳理了2000-2025年间关于痉挛肌肉识别方法的研究，揭示了该领域的方法学空白，对ALS等上运动神经元疾病的对症治疗具有转化价值。

items.titleZh: 与散发性ALS相关的SQSTM1 L341V变异促进泛素阳性SQSTM1小体增大和积累
items.summaryZh: 该研究报道了SQSTM1基因的L341V变异在散发性ALS患者中被发现，并在细胞模型中证实该变异导致泛素阳性的SQSTM1蛋白聚集体（小体）增大和积累，提示其可能通过干扰自噬-泛素蛋白酶体系统参与ALS发病。
